name: 14p_acrocentric_shore
description: Chr14 acrocentric p-arm distal to the centromere and proximal to the NOR. Composed of inter-acrocentric SD modules (DJ/PJ duplicons), beta-satellite tandem arrays, and HSat3 blocks recurring at >95% identity on all five acrocentric short arms (13p, 14p, 15p, 21p, 22p). T2T-CHM13 resolves the architecture; GRCh38 leaves it as a gap interval. NOR proper is documented in /ribosomal/chr14_NOR.json.

architecture.internal_structure: DJ and PJ acrocentric duplicons (1-100 kb modules at 95-99% identity) interleaved with HSat3, beta-satellite, gamma-satellite, and rDNA tail; recombination across acrocentrics produces Robertsonian translocations.
